ai_jobs_lease_shape_check.name: ai_jobs_lease_shape_check
ai_jobs_lease_shape_check.value: ("ai_jobs"."status" = 'leased' and "ai_jobs"."lease_owner" is not null and "ai_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null) or ("ai_jobs"."status" <> 'leased')

ai_runs_hashes_check.name: ai_runs_hashes_check
ai_runs_hashes_check.value: ("ai_runs"."response_hash" is null or char_length("ai_runs"."response_hash") = 64) and ("ai_runs"."proposal_hash" is null or char_length("ai_runs"."proposal_hash") = 64)

accounts_identity_only_tokens_redacted.name: accounts_identity_only_tokens_redacted
accounts_identity_only_tokens_redacted.value: "accounts"."access_token" is null and "accounts"."refresh_token" is null and "accounts"."id_token" is null
